title: Floral Greek Fish Stir-fry
description: A tender and floral dish featuring shaoxing wine and perfectly cooked fish with a touch of lazy-sunday comfort in a gluten-free-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Shaoxing wine
ingredients.notes: for deglazing pan and seasoning fish

ingredients.name: Fresh herbs (rosemary, thyme)
ingredients.notes: dried or fresh, depending on availability and preference

ingredients.name: Minced ginger
ingredients.notes: optional for extra depth of flavor

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Rinse fish fillets thoroughly.
In a small bowl, mix shaoxing wine with soy sauce. Season fish with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic, ginger (if using), rosemary, thyme, and a pinch of salt. Sauté until fragrant and slightly golden.
